It is a small, herbaceous perennial that produces delicate, white flowers.

intro: Lapeirousia schimperi, also known as Cape tulip, is a species of flowering plant in the family Iridaceae. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help to reduce inflammation, fight off infections, and alleviate respiratory issues.
